prestazioni: F140B Ferrari-derived 6.0L V12 engine (Type F140B) upgraded with a custom Motec M150 ECU remap targeting 800+ HP via aggressive camshaft profiles (290° duration, 12.5mm lift) and a bespoke dry-sump lubrication system from HPE (High Performance Engineering) to eliminate oil starvation under 1.5G lateral loads

Garrett GT4202R twin-turbocharger kit (ball-bearing, 84mm inducer) with custom Inconel 625 exhaust manifolds by Novitec Tridente, paired with a dual-ceramic-coated 3.5" titanium exhaust system from Capristo (Euro 6 compliant) and a secondary wastegate-controlled boost pressure of 1.8 bar (26 psi) for linear power delivery up to 9,000 RPM

Öhlins TTX40 3-way adjustable coilovers with 12-position rebound damping, 24-position compression damping, and remote reservoirs, paired with a custom-fabricated tubular subframe reinforcement by G-Tech Motorsport to eliminate chassis flex under high-speed cornering (validated via FEA analysis for 2.0G+ lateral acceleration)
estetica: Full carbon-fiber bodywork replacement kit by Novitec Tridente, including a 3D-scanned front splitter with integrated air curtains, a rear diffuser with active Gurney flap (electrically adjustable via CAN bus), and a GT3-spec rear wing with dual-element design (adjustable angle of attack via hydraulic actuators)

Brembo GT-R monobloc 6-piston calipers (front) and 4-piston calipers (rear) with 410mm CCM-R carbon-ceramic rotors (floating design, 3D-printed titanium hats) and custom titanium brake lines by HEL Performance, finished in gold anodized caliper covers with Maserati trident engravings

OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT forged wheels (20x11.5" front, 20x13" rear) with custom offset (-30mm front, -45mm rear) and Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (325/25 R20 front, 355/25 R20 rear), wrapped in a bespoke matte Grigio Touring paint scheme with exposed carbon-fiber weave accents by Carrozzeria Zanasi
